2604.24468.title: A Survey on Split Learning for LLM Fine-Tuning: Models, Systems, and Privacy Optimizations
2604.24468.paper_summary: Fine-tuning unlocks large language models (LLMs) for specialized applications, but its high computational cost often puts it out of reach for resource-constrained organizations. While cloud platforms could provide the needed resources, data privacy concerns make sharing sensitive information with third parties risky. A promising solution is split learning for LLM fine-tuning, which divides the model between clients and a server, allowing collaborative and secure training through exchanged intermediate data, thus enabling resource-constrained participants to adapt LLMs safely. % In light of this, a growing body of literature has emerged to advance this paradigm, introducing varied model methods, system optimizations, and privacy defense-attack techniques for split learning. To bring clarity and direction to the field, a comprehensive survey is needed to classify, compare, and critique these diverse approaches. This paper fills the gap by presenting the first extensive survey dedicated to split learning for LLM fine-tuning. We propose a unified, fine-grained training pipeline to pinpoint key operational components and conduct a systematic review of state-of-the-art work across three core dimensions: model-level optimization, system-level efficiency, and privacy preservation. Through this structured taxonomy, we establish a foundation for advancing scalable, robust, and secure collaborative LLM adaptation.
2604.24468.paper_summary_zh: 微調使大型語言模型（LLMs）能夠用於專門應用，但其高計算成本往往使資源有限的組織無法承擔。雖然雲端平台可以提供所需的資源，但數據隱私問題使得與第三方共享敏感信息變得風險重重。一個有前景的解決方案是針對LLM微調的分割學習，該方法將模型分為客戶端和伺服器，通過交換中間數據實現協作和安全的訓練，從而使資源有限的參與者能夠安全地調整LLMs。% 鑒於此，越來越多的文獻出現以推進這一範式，介紹了各種模型方法、系統優化和針對分割學習的隱私防禦-攻擊技術。為了為這一領域帶來清晰和方向，需要一項全面的調查來分類、比較和批判這些多樣的方法。本文填補了這一空白，提出了首個專門針對LLM微調的廣泛調查。我們提出了一個統一的、細緻的訓練流程，以確定關鍵操作組件，並對三個核心維度的最新工作進行系統回顧：模型級優化、系統級效率和隱私保護。通過這一結構化的分類法，我們為推進可擴展、穩健和安全的協作LLM調整奠定了基礎。
2604.24468.author: Zihan Liu et.al.
2604.24468.authors: Zihan Liu, Yizhen Wang, Rui Wang, Xiu Tang, Sai Wu
